RESIDENTIAL LEASE AGREEMENT

This Lease Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into as of January 15, 2025,
between Greenfield Properties LLC ("Landlord") and Maria Santos ("Tenant").

PROPERTY: Unit 4B, 1250 Oak Street, Springfield, IL 62704

TERM: The lease term begins February 1, 2025 and ends January 31, 2026
(twelve months). Tenant must provide 60 days written notice before renewal.

RENT: Monthly rent is $1,450.00, due on the 1st of each month.
Late fee of $75.00 applies after the 5th day. Security deposit: $2,900.00.

UTILITIES: Tenant is responsible for electricity, gas, internet, and cable.
Landlord provides water, sewer, and trash collection.

MAINTENANCE: Landlord maintains structural elements, plumbing, HVAC systems.
Tenant responsible for lawn care, minor repairs under $100, and keeping
the premises in clean condition.

PET POLICY: One pet allowed with $500 non-refundable pet deposit.
Maximum weight 50 lbs. Breed restrictions apply per insurance requirements.

INSURANCE: Tenant must maintain renters insurance with minimum $100,000
liability coverage. Proof required within 30 days of move-in.

TERMINATION: Either party may terminate with 60 days written notice.
Early termination fee: two months rent ($2,900.00).
